title: docs: update README — 2026-07-15
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by Apps / Update metrics.)

gist.headline: Fresh pollen on the README
gist.blurb: The README's Latest News section got its daily tending. The garden signposts now point at the newest happenings.
gist.summary: Refreshed the root README's Latest News section for July 15, 2026, keeping the project's public update feed current.
gist.impact: Visitors and contributors will find the latest pollinations.ai news directly from the repository front door.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy open-source garden noticeboard represents the README's Latest News refresh: Polly the bee pins fresh update cards onto a wooden board beside blooming code-plants and a softly glowing retro terminal.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny reporter cap, pinning fresh pixel news cards to a wooden README noticeboard in a blooming code garden. Lime green (#ecf874) appears prominently on the board and terminal glow, with warm cream, mint, and lavender pastels, subtle pixel-font text 'LATEST NEWS', cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
